author: conversor-lattes-para-curriculum-vitae
description: Converts a Lattes CV export (ZIP containing XML) into a professional PDF curriculum vitae. Terminal-based refactor of lattes_para_pdf.ipynb (root). No Jupyter kernel or widget dependencies required.

changelog.notes: Initial release. Full refactor of root-level notebook into a standalone terminal script. ipywidgets interactive editor intentionally excluded (terminal environment). All extraction, PDF rendering, and font registration logic preserved and restructured under Clean Code principles.

known_limitations: Interactive CV editor (Block 5 of the notebook) is not available in terminal mode.
Times New Roman TTF font registration is Windows-specific. Falls back to built-in ReportLab fonts on other operating systems.
Designed for the Lattes XML schema. Other XML schemas are not supported.
